creator: michael.grunewald@laposte.net
text:
Tuareg-mode is an emacs lisp library, it provides functions
        making emacs efficient when editing OCaml programs.

        Tuareg-mode was formerly part of the port tree, but has been
        discontinued, due to maintainer indisponibility. I have
        reworked its files and submit them for reintegration in the
        port tree.

        As suggested to me on `freebsd-ports', I bumped the PORTEPOCH.

Fix: 

Irrelevant.
How-To-Repeat: 	Irrelevant.
